bbc.title: Trump's theatrical State of the Union address offers little hint of any change in course
bbc.description: The BBC's Anthony Zurcher says the US president appealed to his base and taunted his opponents in a marathon speech.

bbc.description: Intensified attacks in the Kordofan region have led to mass casualties as peace remains elusive.

bbc.description: Police have said 85-year-old Chris Baghsarian was not the intended target of the alleged crime.

bbc.title: Louvre museum director resigns months after high-profile heist

wsj.title: Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza on Foot
